productName: Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Tropical Thunder - 10pk (10x0.5g)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Tropical Thunder and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a bright, juicy tropical fruit flavor, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
